codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly resolves the two remaining order-semantics defects (FOK partial-fill abort behavior and order_type boundary validation) and also resolves the monorepo-scaffold Next.js 16 requirement. Original blocking findings from prior failed reviews are now addressed in the reviewed code state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: move-worker procedure requires tests-first TDD, but this fix transcript shows code edits landed before the newly added regression tests while handoff marked followedProcedure=true. This indicates procedure-vs-practice drift in skill feedback reporting.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (workerSessionId cf9b9a5a-42bd-4641-97c5-8dff34c93d9b) shows edits to types.move/order_placement.move before adding test_fok_aborts_on_self_trade_partial_fill and test_invalid_order_type_aborts; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true

summary: Pass. For prior failures: monorepo-scaffold's Next.js mismatch is fixed (web/package.json now ^16.0.0), and contract-order-placement blockers are covered in the reviewed state with matching-enabled IOC/market behavior plus this fix's FOK abort assertion and order_type boundary guard. No blocking issues remain for this fix feature.
